title: Aswathama
subTitle: A man returns to India for his sister's engagement ceremony but discovers that something terrible has happened to her. On his quest for the truth, he uncovers a series of crimes against women.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Chanakya Chandragupta
subTitle: Chandragupta Maurya, a courageous king, defeats Alexander the Great and goes on to establish the Maurya Empire with the assistance of his mentor, Chanakya.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Buridi
subTitle: A gangster and his assistant take a contract to kill a woman in Bangkok. However, their plans are jeopardised when they lose all the important information for the hit.

title: Abhishekam
subTitle: When Vijay, a budding musician, finds out that he has inherited a fatal disease from his father, he persuades his lookalike, Sambaiah, to take care of his ailing mother.

title: Gemini
subTitle: Gemini, a gangster, falls for Manisha, who reciprocates his love without knowing his truth. After getting arrested and completing his term, he tries to convince his lover that he is a changed man.

title: Rayudu
subTitle: Rani rejects Madhu's love due to her father's hatred for his family. However, she is appalled when her father gets married to Lakshmi.

title: Petta
subTitle: In a bid to save his best friend's son Anwar, hostel warden Kaali goes against local goons. However, everything goes haywire when he is forced to face his past.

title: Ayodhya Ramaiah
subTitle: Ayodhya Ramayya, an honest police officer, gets killed by a dreaded gangster. His son learns about his father's death and takes matters further by exposing the gangster's evil deeds.

title: Ungarala Rambabu
subTitle: Ram Babu becomes a strong believer in astrology after Badam Baba helps him. Later, he decides to fight with Savitri's father for his love as Badam Baba tells him to marry her at any cost.

title: Ungarala Rambabu
subTitle: Ram Babu becomes a strong believer in astrology after Badam Baba helps him. Later, he decides to fight with Savitri's father for his love as Badam Baba tells him to marry her at any cost.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Katha
subTitle: After her family gets murdered, Chitra, a lonely girl, spends a year in an asylum. She is petrified when she witnesses another murder and refuses to believe that it is her hallucination.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Sutradharulu
subTitle: When a power hungry man terrorises a village, a young man uses his wit to defend it and proves that non-violence is the wiser choice to defeat evil.

title: Holi
subTitle: Kiran, a young man, falls for Sandhya, who believes in love after marriage. However, she gets confused when she realizes the worth of love after getting her marriage fixed with another man.

title: Kabadi Kabadi
subTitle: Rambabu, a young man, falls in love with Kaveri, who lives in the neighbouring village. However, her brother challenges Rambabu to win a kabaddi match to marry her.

title: Pataas
subTitle: After moving to the city, Kalyan befriends GK, a notorious villain. Later, Kalyan regrets his actions when his friend ruthlessly murders an orphaned girl.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Hari is a dockyard coolie who also drives a rickshaw at night to collect money for his mother's eye operation. His life spins out of control when he learns about a scam involving high profile people.

title: Andhrawala
subTitle: Shankar, leader of a labour union, is killed by a mafia don. His son Munna, who is raised by the slum dwellers, is unaware of his past. However, his enemies identify him and attempt to kill him.

title: Badri
subTitle: A naive villager goes to the city to earn money and buy gold bangles for his mother. However, circumstances force him to fight with criminals and he ends up becoming a gangster.

title: Badri
subTitle: A naive villager goes to the city to earn money and buy gold bangles for his mother. However, circumstances force him to fight with criminals and he ends up becoming a gangster.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Dattha
subTitle: Reformed Rowdy Datta poses as a stranger's son to help a sick woman, but the deception puts his life in danger as he uncovers hidden truths.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Yudda Bhoomi
subTitle: An army officer comes to his village for a vacation. However, seeing the bad state of his village, he stands up against the atrocities that people face because of the evil landlord.

title: Amigos
subTitle: Three identical men befriend each other through a doppelganger-finding application and things go well until the criminal past of one amongst them emerges.

title: Annaatthe
subTitle: After a girl marries her lover and moves to Kolkata, she comes across many threatening situations. Kaaliyan, her brother, leaves no stone unturned to protect her.

title: Srivari Priyuralu
subTitle: Venu, a doctor, gets married to Vasantha, an innocent village girl. However, when he begins an illicit affair with his former lover, his parents decide to teach him a lesson.

title: Deva
subTitle: Two brothers, Vasu and Vel, who happen to be twins are separated at birth and raised in contrasting worlds. Subsequently, Vasu becomes a disciplined officer, while Vel leads a rugged life.

title: Bhadra
subTitle: Bhadra falls in love with Anu, his friend's sister, during his frequent visits to their house. As he becomes entangled in their family feuds, he vows to protect Anu from all harm.

title: People's War
subTitle: When an industrialist decides to start a thermal power plant project in Srikakulam district, a young leader and an honest politician protest against it with the support of the villagers.
